overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character descending a spiral stone staircase inside a gothic cathedral or historic building. The environment features religious artwork, statues in wall niches, and atmospheric warm lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper spiral staircase with religious paintings

events.description: a tall religious statue in a wall niche comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the spiral stone staircase, approaching a statue niche on the right wall

entered.detail: curved stone steps descending in a tight spiral with worn edges
ornate black metal railing with decorative patterns following the stair curve
framed classical painting depicting religious figures on the stone wall
gothic arched stone doorway at the top landing of the stairs
lit wall-mounted torch casting warm orange light on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character begins descending a narrow spiral staircase inside a gothic stone building. A wrought iron railing curves along the right side, while a religious painting hangs on the wall ahead. Warm light from a wall sconce illuminates the scene as the character walks downward toward a statue niche.

scene_state.functional_zone: middle section of spiral staircase passing statue niche

events.description: passing the statue niche, leaving the upper archway behind
a second religious painting comes into view on the inner wall

agents.ego_description: continuing down the spiral stairs, moving past the statue niche and approaching another framed artwork

entered.detail: second framed classical painting showing figures in historical dress

segments.scene_description: The character continues descending, passing closely by the religious statue and leaving the upper archway behind. The first painting disappears from view as a second framed artwork becomes visible on the curving inner wall, illuminated by the passing wall sconce.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower staircase approaching wooden door landing

events.description: a standing figure becomes visible near the large wooden door at the bottom

agents.ego_description: approaching the bottom of the stairs where another person stands waiting near a large wooden door

notable_agents.action: standing still near the wooden door at the bottom of the staircase

entered.detail: large dark wooden double doors with heavy iron hinges set in a gothic stone archway frame

segments.scene_description: As the character nears the bottom of the spiral staircase, a large wooden door with gothic archway comes into view. Another person stands waiting near the door. The second painting passes out of sight as the descent continues toward the landing and the waiting figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent down a narrow spiral staircase that leads from a dimly lit upper gallery toward a gothic exit. It begins with the character walking downward past a wrought iron railing and a religious painting, illuminated by the warm glow of a wall sconce. As the character descends further, the first painting fades from view and the camera passes closely by a statue in a wall niche before a second framed artwork emerges on the curving inner wall. The scene then opens up as the character nears the bottom of the stairs, leaving the artworks behind to reveal a large wooden door with a gothic archway. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the landing and approaches another person waiting by the door.
